name: Todo API
summary: Backend API for managing agent todo/task lists during execution
goals: Track and persist agent task lists during execution
Provide real-time updates on task completion

specDetail.description: Backend endpoints for todo management. GET /api/agents/sessions/:sessionId/todos returns the current todo list. Task updates are streamed as part of the agent's SSE stream.

parameters.name: sessionId
parameters.description: Session ID for the todo list (required)

parameters.name: taskId
parameters.description: Specific task ID for status updates

constraints: Must persist todo state across session reconnections
Must emit SSE events for each task status change
Must allow only valid status transitions (pending -> in-progress -> completed/failed)

acceptanceCriteria.given: a session has an active agent execution
acceptanceCriteria.then: the updated todo list is available via the API and streamed to connected clients

syncMeta.baseCommitMessage: docs(sync-specs): implement leaf determination redesign with frontend/backend criteria
